problem id: 114a41e3
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(5) XOR SHR(2)

examples:
  11100001 -> 00011000
  10000010 -> 01100000
  00000111 -> 11100001
  11000001 -> 00010000
  00110000 -> 00001100
  01101000 -> 00011010
  00111110 -> 11001111
  01111110 -> 11011111
  11101110 -> 11111011

query: 01100111
predicted answer: 11111001
